instructions: Please answer the following items by deciding how much you agree with the statements. (Circle the numbers that best reflect your opinions)

items.question: I want to earn more than my current income level in the long run.

metadata.note: Filler item; not used in any analysis

items.question: I am looking for businesses or employment with higher income.

metadata.note: Filler item; not used in any analysis

items.question: I believe that past entrepreneurial experience helps in assessing riskiness of a new business.

metadata.note: Higher scores indicate greater planning fallacy (belief that past experience predicts future outcomes)

items.question: I believe that the key issues of running different types of businesses are similar.

metadata.note: Higher scores indicate greater planning fallacy (overgeneralizing from past experience)

items.question: I can accurately forecast the total demand for my business.

metadata.note: Higher scores indicate greater illusion of control

items.question: I can accurately forecast when larger competitors will enter the market.

metadata.note: Higher scores indicate greater illusion of control

items.question: I can make my business a success, even though others may fail.

metadata.note: Higher scores indicate greater illusion of control
